svg.title: PyScraper v7 — module architecture and data workflow
svg.desc: Seven-tier diagram showing data flowing from seed input through anti-bot, fetch, extraction, dedup, pipeline, storage, and observability layers. Each module is labelled with its file name and key features, connected by directional arrows showing the workflow.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do seed URLs enter the scraper in scraper.py?')
sendPrompt('How does sitemap discovery work in the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does per-domain crawl budget work?')
sendPrompt('How does PageRank boost URL priority?')
sendPrompt('How does proxy rotation work in anti_bot.py?')
sendPrompt('How does TLS fingerprint spoofing work with curl-cffi?')
sendPrompt('How does CAPTCHA solving work in the crawler?')
sendPrompt('How does the Redis ZSET frontier work?')
sendPrompt('How does the bloom filter deduplicate URLs?')
sendPrompt('How does the weighted-fair domain scheduler work?')
sendPrompt('How does the async robots.txt check work?')
sendPrompt('How does the httpx HTTP/2 fetcher work?')
sendPrompt('How does the circuit breaker prevent hammering failing domains?')
sendPrompt('How does the Playwright pool handle infinite scroll and CAPTCHAs?')
sendPrompt('How does trafilatura improve article text quality?')
sendPrompt('How does JSON-LD schema.org extraction work?')
sendPrompt('How does spaCy NER entity extraction work?')
sendPrompt('How does language detection work?')
sendPrompt('How does SHA-256 exact dedup work with the bloom filter?')
sendPrompt('How does simhash LSH near-duplicate detection work?')
sendPrompt('How does semantic deduplication work with sentence-transformers and Qdrant?')
sendPrompt('How does the PostgreSQL writer work with atomic done commits?')
sendPrompt('What does Redis store beyond the URL frontier?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenSearch full-text indexing work?')
sendPrompt('How does the WAL append-only event log work?')
sendPrompt('What Prometheus metrics does PyScraper v7 expose?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenTelemetry tracing work in the crawler?')
sendPrompt('Show me the Grafana dashboard for PyScraper.')
sendPrompt('What alert rules should I set up for the crawler?')
